phase_transitions.name: Phase 6 - Output Validation
phase_transitions.result: All 11 ACs PASS. validatePipelineState chokepoint at src/pipeline/output-validator.ts. 6 graph integrity checks always fail-hard, 3 semantic header checks warn-by-default with --strict-headers promotion. validation-report.json with 11 numeric fields written to .coderef/. valid_edge_count=3450, ambiguous_count=3286, builtin_count=1096, header_missing_count=259, all defined-file drift fields=0. All 6 Phase 0 graph-ground-truth assertions remain PASSING. 54 test files / 140 tests / 0 failures.

commits.summary: structural foundation (types, validator skeleton, populate.ts wiring, Phase 5 boundary enforcer deletion, Phase 7 boundary enforcer scaffolding)
feat(pipeline-output-validation): 1.7-1.10 implement 6 graph-integrity + 3 header-drift checks + buildReport + loadLayerEnum safeguard
fix(graph-integrity): reframe GI-6 to name+file+line tuple to allow legitimate nested fns
fix(element-extractor): add early return after class_body recursion to prevent duplicate nested-fn emission (Phase 1 piggyback per ORCHESTRATOR Option A authorization)
feat(pipeline): add Phase 6 output-validator test suite + workorder docs
docs(roadmap): mark Phase 6 ARCHIVED, mark Phase 7 NEXT
